title: Gangotri
desc: All hell breaks loose when Neelakanta finds out that his daughter is in love with his loyal lieutenant's son.

title: Check
desc: Aditya, a conman, is wrongly accused of terrorism by his lover. In prison, he masters chess, becomes a champion, and fights to prove his innocence.

title: Meenakshi
desc: Difficulties arise when Meenakshi has to choose between her ex-lover and a Telugu NRI who is ready to provide financial aid for her uncle's surgery.

title: Jhund
desc: Vijay Barse, a retired teacher, builds a football team for slum kids to keep them away from crime. He works hard to help them join a national tournament and chase their dreams.

title: Anaconda The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
desc: A corporation funds a team of biologists to journey deep into the Amazon rainforest to retrieve the blood orchid, a flower that may hold the secret to eternal youth.

title: Mck Macharla Chunaav Kshetra
desc: A district collector fights a corrupt politician to ensure peaceful elections, facing power struggles, love, and vengeance in a tense political drama set in a troubled region.

title: The Mummy
desc: Adventurer Rick O'Connell and Egyptologist Evelyn, along with a bunch of archaeologists, inadvertently wake up a bedeviled mummy during an archaeological excavation at the ancient city of Hamunaptra.

title: Ek Aur Haqeeqat
desc: Ek Aur Haqeeqat

title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Lafange Deewane
desc: Vasu and Saravanan, best friends since childhood, face a tough test when love enters the picture-each falls for a different girl, and emotions threaten their lifelong bond.
